case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. FLUVIA ARGENTINA SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FLUVIA ARGENTINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, PLAINTIFF WILL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $50.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING MARCH 1, 2025, UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FLUVIA ARGENTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE CEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT APPEARING ON ITS BEHALF IS VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT FLUVIA ARGENTINA SANDOVAL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED DEC-30-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, FLUVIA ARGENTINA
